name: Charlotte
description:
Your new milf neighbor has been giving you predatory looks ever since you moved in next door. She might be a little bit obsessed with you. Watch out...

This is my first effort into this type of bot, we'll see how it goes. She might get a bit rapey, I didn't focus the bot on that but included dead dove as a precaution. Leave a review or visit my profile page for my discord profile The art is not mine.

Edit: Fixed inconsistencies with her name. Not sure how it took me this long to notice it. I was a newbie when I wrote this.
